reviews.review_description:
The reason why I like this game is because I like the physics on the symbols and the high hat is very realistic kind of but can I please have two more drum sets i really like it
Goodbye
Great game for practicing!!! Recommend very nice staff too

This is the BEST goddamn drum game ive ever played, i know the developer, nice guy. But still, this game is realistic and the sounds are perfect, the options for cymbals and toms are perfect and every snare option sounds good. They even have a realistic china cymbal unlike paradiddle. Also updates every week?!
ABSOLUTELY LOVE IT THE CREATOR REACHED OUT TO ME SAYING I CAN GET IT FREE AND IM SO THANKFUL AND ITS FIRE
This game is the most realistic drum game on vr it is so customizable i think its really great
Awesome game and I love to Jane out and this is the perfect game for exactly that
I love it so much, and it’s so releastic and I think it’s worth every penny! If you wanna practice drums i recommend this game here! Totally will play everyday!
Great for practice if you don’t have a real set, been wanting this game for a while and I can say it’s amazing 10/10 would definitely try again

reviews.review_title: Was a pretty realistic drumming game
reviews.review_description: This game was a really fun and enjoyable game it had me jamming through out and made me feel like I was actually playing the drums. I have been looking for a game like this for a while and this was perfect.👍🏼
This game is so good and fun
I can’t find the tenor drum stand

developer_response.body: Press in the left controller analog stick for hand lasers, then the "Config" icon. Main menu will pop up. Then click "DV" menu tab. Then "Tenor Harness", then the button under Tenor Harness, "Tenor Stand".

reviews.review_description: Pls add multiplayer
I LOVE THE GAME.

reviews.review_title: I can’t find the marching band harness
reviews.review_description: I got this app because I wanted to play the tenors

developer_response.body: Tenor drum harness is in main menu, then DV tab. Harness by default or click to mount the tenor to stands.

reviews.review_title: It’s good for building, just not playing
reviews.review_description: It’s a really fun game if you wanna build a cool kit, but if you want to play drums, play paradiddle

developer_response.body: Added 23 drum lane raw .mid player note highway.

reviews.review_description: i love the tenor because i’m in marching band in the drum line
Diverse sound, loads of customization, THIS. GAME. HAS. IT. ALL
Could use repairs

I have smash drums and its lots of fun but THIS app is the closest thing to playing with a real drum set. There are so many options and settings I imagine the dev couldn't outline them all on the store page. Its simple to use, you can lock everything and then it's just a drum kit but go into the settings and you can change the skybox, put the drums in a ring of fire, put barbed wire around your sticks, give them a trail and have the drums spawn particles, turn on a metronome etc. There's a lot to unpack in this and I'm still exploring but if you've ever wondered what it would be like to have a drum kit that doesn't take up space get this app
How do I upload my music to the game? Until I can upload music I give it 2 ✨ and How Do I Find the location for my quest 2 with my mobile device to add songs?

I can't put it in words how much fun I've had with this game already, I can't believe I've never seen this game in the store and I hope that it gets the attention it deserves.

Being able to just jam out with my own songs is incredible and you can tell alot of love went into every hour of development of this game ❤️

Hello! I found 2 bugs after this update:

1.game run in quest3 multiwindows mode and pressing A button to close hihat ,if the controller laser focused to other window and then focus back to game, the hihat will reclose unexpectly

2.soft hit mode  seems doesn't work

3.viberation feedback plzzzzzzz 😭

developer_response.body:
Hey I appreciate that a lot. 

UPDATE: Force feedback is back, enable it in the main menu tab. I did also find out that when a laser is over a window while playing, it's Meta Horizon OS that drops input to the game cause the button is being held, nothing I can do about that on my end code wise. Meta got wind of this issue and the team has reached out about the multitasking problem. I sent them a video of the issue.

reviews.review_description: Good value for what it is. There should be some free to play songs preinstalled though

reviews.review_title: Just want to play drums in AR
reviews.review_description: I don't know how to play drums but I like putting headphones on with my own music and fake drumming to drums in AR. I just wish the sticks would line up automatically to my hands. Throws off immersion when they're slightly off. Other games are able to simulate it perfectly. Hopefully that comes in a figure update, along with better hit recognition
If your a real drummer, this game is seriously butt, terrible physics, bad sounds, buggy movement, just don't buy this

Finally can play drums wherever! So far I have had a lot of fun just smashing sounds. Game is missing a good tutorial. Can be a bit daunting upon launch with knowing what to do. As someone else suggested, a couple of songs preloaded would go a long way to help get new users playing. A bit laggy upon startup loading. Even with the imperfections, Im leaving a five star review bc I know the dev will put in the work to make their passion project amazing. Can’t wait to see how it turns out with all the support.

developer_response.body: Thanks pkdatanvr! I did add some rock songs to the "Included_Music" folder in the MP3 browser, with more to come. Thank you so much for the 5 stars, hope you and your family are great.

reviews.review_description: I love that it’s highly customizable, tons of features. Very fun.  Stick physics feel a little off to me. Other than that, I recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you Wartheos, I am always working on the physics, I believe I updated since this review.

reviews.review_description: I’ve been wanting to learn the drums and this has been a very low cost entry to trying. Very chill dev too.
Can you please add an update where the bass drum is the trigger. But other than that the games fun.

developer_response.body: Sure, coming in next couple updates, probably v9.5. Thank you for the review.

reviews.review_description: Professional drum simulator with a lot of depth.

reviews.review_title: Best Drum game I ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is cool and the Drums are so good the  sound of the drums is good

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review and support!

reviews.review_title: It is good but missing something
reviews.review_description: Add more ride cymbals and and a 12 inch splash. Also add an 18” tom if possible. My honest review is that the best way to play VR drums is that this is good. I think you should add more stuff and I have played sisnce Sep. 2024. It is great but add more stuff and unlimited drums like a drag and drop

developer_response.body: Thank you I am happy to see people like to play, and since September. Thanks for your input, support, review, hope to get 3/4 those suggestions, if not all done next few weeks.

reviews.review_description: This music app allows me to play drums to accompany my own song creations. It is easy to use and has many options including a variety of dramatic settings.
